# U-Move Australia — Shipping Container Solutions in Perth, WA

## About U-Move Australia
U-Move Australia is a Perth-based shipping container company with over 25 years of industry experience. We provide container hire, sales, modifications, self-storage, and Mining Solutions across Perth and greater Western Australia. Our facility is located at 836 Cockburn Road, Henderson, WA 6166.

## Core Services

### Self Storage Perth
U-Move delivers secure shipping containers to your door for easy, affordable self-storage. Pack at your pace, then store on-site or at our 24/7 monitored Henderson facility. Up to 50% cheaper than traditional storage.

### Container Sales Perth
We stock one of WA's largest inventories of new and used shipping containers. Available in 10ft, 20ft, and 40ft sizes, including standard, high cube, refrigerated, insulated, side-opening, flat-rack, and dangerous goods containers. Delivery across Perth metro and beyond.

### Container Hire Perth
Flexible short-term and long-term container hire. Ideal for moving, construction sites, events, and temporary storage. Competitive rates with fast delivery.

### Custom Container Modifications Perth
Our Henderson workshop specialises in custom container modifications for mining, oil & gas, construction, retail, and residential use. We build site offices, workshops, ablution blocks, crib rooms, hydration stations, rigging containers, tool stores, dangerous goods containers, cafes, and container homes.

### Mining & Industrial Solutions
Purpose-built container solutions for mining operations, including rigging storage, crib rooms (up to 10 people with AC and kitchenette), hydration stations, tool stores, and dangerous goods containers.

## Container Sizes
- 10ft: 3.10m x 2.44m x 2.59m (external)
- 20ft: 6.05m x 2.44m x 2.59m (external)
- 40ft: 12.19m x 2.44m x 2.59m (external)
All containers are wind, water, and vermin-proof, and fully lockable.

- Hours: Monday–Friday 8:00am–4:00pm

- 25+ years of industry experience in Perth, WA
- Secure 24/7 monitored storage facility in Henderson
- In-house modification workshop
- Serving residential, commercial, industrial, and mining clients
- Delivery across Perth metro and greater WA
